modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Examplify error due to minimum screen resolution requirement

full_description_text: 
I keep getting an error when I try to open Examplify. It says my screen resolution is too low and that I need at least 1280 X 768. This happens every time I launch the application on my Windows laptop.
short_description: Examplify error due to minimum screen resolution requirement
description: I keep getting an error when I try to open Examplify. It says my screen resolution is too low and that I need at least 1280 X 768. This happens every time I launch the application on my Windows laptop.
